description: Canonical post-AH-75 trace for a transfer_to_agent dispatch to a review-pipeline-wrapped specialist. Used by MER-E extractor validation and fixture conformance tests. This fixture is the canonical TARGET shape: every span carries an 'emission_status' of either 'emitted' (written by the current KEN-E runtime) or 'deferred' (target shape that the current runtime does NOT yet emit — see the span's 'deferred_reason' and docs/trace-structure-spec.md section 14.2). MER-E extractors MUST treat 'deferred' spans and any 'deferred_summary' fields as absent in live traces until their owning follow-up ships. See docs/trace-structure-spec.md and docs/design/components/agentic-harness/projects/AH-PRD-09-trace-contract-diff.md for the authoritative spec.

children.name: business_researcher_worker

deferred_summary.specialist_output: Market opportunity analysis: (1) Emerging LATAM mid-market, (2) SMB automation tooling, (3) Vertical SaaS consolidation.

children.deferred_reason: The {doc_id}_worker agent span IS emitted today (weave_before/after callbacks propagated from build_agent), but weave_after_agent_callback writes only output={status, text} and leaves summary empty. The iteration-level annotations under 'deferred_summary' (iteration, specialist_output) are NOT yet written. Deferred — see trace-structure-spec.md section 14.2.

children.name: business_researcher_review_reviewer
children.deferred_reason: The reviewer LlmAgent (app/adk/agents/utils/review_pipeline.py) is constructed with no before/after agent callbacks, so weave_before_agent_callback never runs for it and NO *_review_reviewer span is emitted in live traces. The 'summary' below is the target shape only. Deferred — see trace-structure-spec.md section 14.2.
